author: Holtrr
title: Bass boost and virtualizer.
content:
Can you please increase the bass option and add the wider sound option virtualizer. Thank you

The equaliser needs clear improvements, please can you make it more clear and full bass. Thank you 🙏

author: nnejyp
title: I gave 5 stars but i was wrong
content: I bought the app outright, but after using it for one day its crashing no matter what i do. I couldnt even contact the developers to let them know.

author: Mike.e.2002
title: Cloudverbindung
content: Entgegen den Hinweisen bei der Upgradeversion werden nicht alle Cloudverbindingen von Evermusic hier unterstützt. Es fehlt HiDrive. Warum?

author: aguynamedchriss
title: Wish it worked…
content: App crashes every time I try to play a 360 mp4 on my NAS. And if I add those mp4s to my library, the app crashes forever / I need to uninstall the app to fix.

title: Nie można playlisty robić w wersji darmowej po aktualizacji
content: Nie można playlisty robić w wersji darmowej po aktualizacji

title: Открывает не все форматы
content:

author: msy_aaa
title: ピクチャインピクチャーについて
content:
ピクチャインピクチャーで再生して動画が終わったら終了するのを直して欲しい。

ピクチャインピクチャーを選択時動画終了後も秒時されてて欲しい

author: シーマロバ
title: よい！
content: とても良いです！が、バックグラウンド再生が出来なくなりました、改善すること良いです！

author: Gabsapps
title: Lack of atmos support turns me off
content: If we can get Dolby atmos in a update I’ll change my review u guys did get it working in flacbox we need it here

author: ArturGGPRO
title: Video Codecs
content: Overall, the app is ok. I liked equalizer feature in the video. But, the biggest drawback is the lack of support for Dolby Vision and all the necessary codecs for HDR10/Dolby Vision/Dolby Atmos. This would allow users to watch 40-70 GB releases from cinemas on their phones. Until this feature is added, the “Infuse” app remains the best choice for viewing content in the highest quality.

author: Kellie calderón
title: This app is good but I’m having a problem
content: This app is good, but when I’m trying to play my files on shuffle mode, the app get stuck

author: Applespike_Willy Wonka
title: It's okay.
content:
It's an okay app, but can you make it so that when you turn your phone off (without exiting the app), in the app when your swipe the video down to pick another video, or when the video screen is on and you swipe out of the app, make it so that the video continues playing (if that makes sense). Like how your other app; Evermusic continues playing in the background whether your turn your phone off or swipe down the music file down or go out the app. Could you try to make it like that app. 
I'm always having to manually play videos either by the control centre or the lockscreen.
